  malware_multiple_variants.family = CASE WHEN malware_multiple_variants.family IS NULL OR malware_multiple_variants.family = '' THEN 'Unknown' ELSE malware_multiple_variants.family END,
  malware_multiple_variants.summary = CASE WHEN malware_multiple_variants.summary IS NULL OR malware_multiple_variants.summary = '' THEN 'Malicious payload delivered via fake reservation emails; described as a mix of malware variants.' ELSE malware_multiple_variants.summary END
MERGE (incident_ta558_travel_hosp)-[:involved_malware {evidence:'Links in fake reservation emails deliver a malicious malware payload containing a potpourri of malware variants.'}]->(malware_multiple_variants)
MERGE (threatActor_ta558)-[:uses {evidence:'Fake reservation emails deliver a malicious payload containing multiple malware variants.'}]->(malware_multiple_variants)
MERGE (threatActor_ta558)-[:uses {evidence:'Use of RAR file attachments linked to messages.'}]->(tool_rar)
MERGE (threatActor_ta558)-[:uses {evidence:'Use of ISO file attachments linked to messages.'}]->(tool_iso)

MERGE (cve_2023_32369:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-32369'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_2023_32369.published_date = date('2023-05-18'),
  cve_2023_32369.summary = '“Migraine” vulnerability involving macOS migration could allow an attacker with root access to automatically bypass System Integrity Protection (SIP) in macOS and perform arbitrary operations; fixed in Apple security updates released May 18, 2023.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_2023_32369.published_date = coalesce(cve_2023_32369.published_date, date('2023-05-18')),
  cve_2023_32369.summary = coalesce(cve_2023_32369.summary, '“Migraine” vulnerability involving macOS migration could allow an attacker with root access to automatically bypass System Integrity Protection (SIP) in macOS and perform arbitrary operations; fixed in Apple security updates released May 18, 2023.');
